item: This Current Policy (“Policy”) defines the current and binding rules governing the use of the Vivoolio Marketplace website and related services (“Platform”). This Policy applies to all users, including consumers, producers, distributors, professionals, advertisers, and partners.
In case of any conflict between this Policy and any other documents, this Policy shall prevail unless explicitly stated otherwise.

list: browsing and using the Vivoolio Marketplace website;
purchasing goods and services via the Platform;
publishing content, listings, reviews, ratings, and promotional materials;
participation in promotions, campaigns, bonuses, cashback, or loyalty programs;
interactions between users, sellers, and third parties.

item: Vivoolio operates as a digital marketplace and technology platform only.

list: is not the seller, producer, distributor, or importer of goods listed unless explicitly stated;
does not guarantee product quality, origin, certification, legality, or suitability unless required by applicable law;
is not responsible for fulfillment, delivery, customs, taxation, or product compliance, which remain the sole responsibility of the seller.

item: All transactions are concluded directly between buyers and sellers.

list: Product descriptions, images, prices, availability, certifications, and claims are provided by sellers.
Vivoolio does not warrant that listings are accurate, complete, or up to date.
Sellers may update or remove listings at any time.
Availability is not guaranteed and may change without notice.
Prices are set by sellers and may include or exclude taxes, shipping, and additional fees.
Vivoolio may charge platform, service, subscription, promotion, or transaction fees, as disclosed separately.
Payments may be processed via third-party payment providers.
Vivoolio does not store full payment card details.

item: Currency conversion, bank fees, and processing delays are outside Vivoolio’s control.

list: Refunds and returns are governed by the seller’s individual return policy, applicable law, and platform rules.
Vivoolio may facilitate dispute communication but is not obligated to resolve disputes.
Digital services, subscriptions, advertising, promotional tools, and virtual items are generally non-refundable, unless required by law.
Chargebacks or fraudulent activity may result in account suspension or termination.

item: Users may submit reviews, ratings, comments, and media, provided that such content:
list: is truthful, lawful, and non-misleading;
does not contain hate speech, defamation, personal data of third parties, or illegal content;
does not manipulate ratings or misrepresent experiences.

item: Vivoolio reserves the right to moderate, remove, restrict, or flag content at its sole discretion.

list: Sellers may purchase promotional placements, boosted listings, advertising tools, or featured positions.
Visibility does not guarantee sales, traffic, or performance.
Vivoolio may change algorithms, ranking logic, visibility rules, or promotion mechanics at any time.
Bonuses, cashback, virtual rewards, or internal credits are non-cash, non-transferable, and may expire.
Vivoolio may modify, suspend, or terminate any reward program without prior notice.
Abuse or manipulation may result in forfeiture of rewards and account restrictions.
suspend or terminate accounts for violations, fraud, abuse, or legal risks;
restrict access to services without prior notice where required for security, compliance, or operational reasons.

item: Termination does not relieve users of outstanding obligations.
Personal data is processed in accordance with the Privacy Policy, applicable data protection laws (including GDPR where applicable), and internal security standards.
Vivoolio may use anonymized and aggregated data for analytics, optimization, and business purposes.
Vivoolio may update this Current Policy at any time.
list: Changes become effective upon publication on the Platform.
Continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the updated Policy.
It is the user’s responsibility to review this Policy regularly.

item: Unless otherwise required by applicable law:
list: This Policy shall be governed by the laws specified in Vivoolio’s Terms of Use.
Disputes shall be resolved in accordance with the dispute resolution clause of the Terms of Use.
